title: CVE-2012-3128 — CVSS 3.7 (UNKNOWN)
content:
# CVE-2012-3128

CVSS Score: 3.7 (UNKNOWN)
Published: 2012-07-17T23:55:03.567
CWEs: NVD-CWE-noinfo

Unspecified vulnerability in Oracle SPARC T-Series Servers running System Firmware 8.2.0 and 8.1.4.e or earlier allows local users to affect confidentiality, integrity, and availability via unknown vectors related to Integrated Lights Out Manager.

References: http://osvdb.org/83973, http://www.mandriva.com/security/advisories?name=MDVSA-2013:150, http://www.oracle.com/technetwork/topics/security/cpujul2012-392727.html
